scenarios.capability: Produce nx.json targetDefaults with correct dependsOn, inputs, and cache settings for build/test/lint
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a static JSON file with the correct targetDefaults structure.

scenarios.capability: Configure @nx/enforce-module-boundaries depConstraints for a given tag taxonomy
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a .eslintrc.json file with the correct depConstraints array.

scenarios.capability: Assign correct scope and type tags to a set of projects in their project.json files
scenarios.reason: Requires producing project.json files with the correct tags arrays.

scenarios.capability: Define a CI workflow that uses nx affected with explicit base/head instead of run-many --all
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a CI configuration file (e.g. GitHub Actions workflow YAML) with the correct affected command invocation.
